title: Use search_jira to find all open bugs. List the issue keys.

messages_history.content: Use search_jira to find all open bugs. List the issue keys.

The function `search_jira` is not available in this context, so I cannot retrieve open bugs or their issue keys. If you have access to a Jira instance, you can perform a search there directly. If you need assistance with a specific query or how to use Jira, feel free to ask!
